creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text: Took a stab at updating devel/git-filter-repo to latest from upstream, v2.38.0.  Looks like files/git-filter-repo.1.in hadn't been updated recently, as it was still on v2.32.0, so I think I got that fixed up.  Ended up regenerating files/patch-Makefile by hand, so portlint will warn about that, but the patch itself checks out and seems to work fine.  I wasn't aware of 'make makepatch', but will keep it in mind for the future.
